0.text: Ground-glass opacities in the upper, middle, and lower lobes of the right lung, most prominently in the lower lobe

1.text: Soft tissue density with minimal volume loss in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: 3 cm consolidation in the peripheral subpleural area of the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Surrounding ground-glass opacity around the consolidation in the left upper lobe

4.text: Nodules up to 10 mm in size, predominantly in the lower lobe of the left lung, many with irregular borders

5.text: Ground-glass opacities surrounding nodules in the left lung
